package rulecoverage

func NegativeServiceCallsHandlerHelper() string {
    ruleID := "service_calls_handler_helper"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Service packages that reach upward into handler helpers for parsing, rendering, or Gin-specific utilities."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
